title: Arad Quality Intelligence
subtitle: Autonomous Quality Control Agent for Manufacturing
narration: Introducing Arad Quality Intelligence. An autonomous quality control agent for manufacturing that does GR and R, SPC, and twenty-four seven alerting, in seconds instead of days.

title: The Problem
subtitle: Manual quality work eats days
narration: In a typical plant, quality work is slow, periodic, and reactive. GR and R studies take hours by hand. SPC charts get checked once per shift. And alerting depends entirely on who happens to be watching. Arad fixes all of that.
This is the main dashboard. It shows a real-time overview of your measurement health. Active series, recent GR and R verdicts, the autonomous monitor status, and alert counts, all at a glance.

The SPC Monitor runs individual moving range control charts, continuously. Every thirty seconds, the autonomous monitor re-analyses your active series using Nelson and Western Electric rules. When a process drifts out of control, you know within seconds, not shifts.

GR and R studies are computed instantly using the AIAG X-bar R method. Upload your study data, parts by operators by trials, and get EV, AV, percent GR and R, and number of distinct categories, with a plain English verdict. Acceptable, conditional, or unacceptable.

The alert inbox shows every violation the monitor has caught. Each alert carries an AI-written explanation and a recommended corrective action. Alerts fan out to Slack, email, SMS via Twilio, and JIRA tickets, automatically.
The review queue lets quality engineers approve or reject study results with one click, building a complete, auditable decision trail.
The AI copilot answers quality questions in plain English. It's powered by your choice of Gemini, Claude, or OpenAI, with a deterministic AIAG fallback so it works even with no AI key.

The connections page lets you configure every integration from the UI. Slack, email, SMS, JIRA, your MES or QMS feed, and AI providers, each with a one-click test button. All credentials are stored encrypted.
The audit trail records every study completion, review decision, and alert dispatch. When a customer asks who reviewed what, and when, the answer is here.

title: Built on Proven Technology
subtitle: FastAPI · Next.js · TimescaleDB · Kafka · Docker
narration: Under the hood, Arad is a full production stack. FastAPI backend, Next.js dashboard, TimescaleDB for time-series data, Apache Kafka for streaming, Redis for caching, with Prometheus, Grafana, and MLflow for observability. All orchestrated by Docker Compose.

title: Arad Quality Intelligence
subtitle: Detect · Analyze · Explain · Notify — in seconds
narration: Arad Quality Intelligence. Detect, analyze, explain, and notify, in seconds instead of days. Self-hosted, AIAG compliant, AI-assisted, and always on.
